text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the concert, Smart Falcon<n>notices Mihono
Bourbon in the<n>audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon relates that she can't<n>comprehend what
exactly she felt at<n>our previous concert, but
something<n>was telling her to come again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deciphering Bourbon's confusion as<n>the desire to
convey her feelings to<n>others, Falcon invites her to
take part<n>in our project.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having felt the power of song for<n>herself, Bourbon
decides to join the<n>team.
